knownIssues.title: VIVE Hub software required for PC streaming
knownIssues.description: Both USB and Wi-Fi PC streaming require HTC's VIVE Hub desktop application. VIVE Hub has had stability issues on some Windows configurations.
knownIssues.workaround: Install VIVE Hub from the HTC website. Run as administrator if you experience connection issues. Ensure Windows Firewall allows VIVE Hub network access.

knownIssues.title: Controller tracking degrades in low light
knownIssues.description: The XR Elite uses camera-based inside-out tracking which relies on ambient lighting. Very dark environments significantly degrade controller tracking accuracy.
knownIssues.workaround: Ensure play space has at least moderate ambient lighting. Avoid VR in complete darkness.

knownIssues.title: Standalone mode defaults to 60Hz on some firmware
knownIssues.description: Some firmware versions limit standalone refresh rate to 60Hz. PC streaming modes override this, but standalone games may feel less smooth.
knownIssues.workaround: Check display settings in the headset system menu and force 90Hz if available. Update firmware to latest version.

optimizationTips.tip: USB streaming delivers lower and more stable latency than Wi-Fi
optimizationTips.simpleExplanation: Plugging in a cable gives you a faster and smoother VR experience than streaming wirelessly.
optimizationTips.advancedExplanation: USB 3.0 streaming via VIVE Hub delivers approximately 10ms lower typical latency versus Wi-Fi, with significantly reduced worst-case spikes. For sim racing, rhythm games, or other latency-sensitive titles, USB is strongly preferred.

optimizationTips.tip: Use Wi-Fi 6 on a dedicated 5GHz SSID for wireless streaming
optimizationTips.simpleExplanation: A dedicated Wi-Fi channel just for your headset means no competition from other devices, keeping things smooth.
optimizationTips.advancedExplanation: VIVE Streaming performs best on an uncongested Wi-Fi 6 channel. Create a dedicated SSID on a non-overlapping 5GHz channel (36, 40, 44, 48). Ensure no other devices are on this SSID. The XR Elite supports Wi-Fi 6 (802.11ax), enabling OFDMA for lower latency.

optimizationTips.tip: Set VIVE Streaming encode quality to High for clearer image
optimizationTips.simpleExplanation: In the VIVE Hub app, set streaming quality to High for a noticeably sharper picture.
optimizationTips.advancedExplanation: VIVE Hub's streaming quality setting adjusts the H.265 encode bitrate. The High setting targets 200+ Mbps, reducing compression artifacts at 1920x1920 per eye resolution. Requires RTX 2070+ for stable HEVC encoding without frame drops.
